productName: BWX BOX 1g WALFREE - Mimosa Runtz Sugar Wax
description: Classic hybrid BHO crafted from Mimosa — hydrocarbon-extracted, fully purged, and dense with cannabinoids for an efficient, hard-hitting dab. Smooth and high-potency, with notes of citrus, orange, and grapefruit, leading into a versatile, anytime balance.
